title: 경계의 다리: 조우
color_mood: 블루-그레이 모노톤, 안개 확산광, 금속 광택

cuts.subject: 안개 속 폐허 석조 다리 전경
cuts.action: 안개가 다리 위를 천천히 흐름, 인물 없음
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic wide establishing shot, ancient ruined stone arch bridge shrouded in dense morning fog, blue-grey monochrome tone, fog drifting slowly across the bridge surface, crumbling stone railings covered in moss, no figures present, telephoto lens compression making fog appear like a wall, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Static locked-off shot, fog drifts left to right, camera breathes slightly

cuts.subject: 에이든이 안개 속에서 다리 나이트 쪽 끝으로 걸어옴
cuts.action: 에이든이 안개를 헤치며 천천히 걸어 다리 끝에 도달해 멈춤
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic telephoto medium shot 200mm, Aiden, medieval knight in dark steel partial plate armor with chain mail, scarred face, brown hair, longsword with runic engravings, figure emerging from thick morning fog onto ruined stone bridge, slow deliberate walk coming to a stop at bridge entrance, blue-grey desaturated atmosphere, armor surface gleaming faintly through fog, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Slow dolly push slightly toward subject as Aiden halts at bridge edge

cuts.camera: telephoto medium shot, 200mm compression, mirrored angle
cuts.subject: 카게마사가 안개 속에서 다리 마이어 쪽 끝으로 나타남
cuts.action: 카게마사가 반대편 끝 안개 속에서 실루엣으로 등장, 천천히 걸어 다리 끝에서 멈춤
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic telephoto medium shot 200mm mirrored angle, Kagemasa, samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, wide shoulder sode, nodachi sword with cherry blossom tsuba, menpou demon-face half-mask, figure materializing as silhouette from dense fog at opposite end of ruined stone bridge, slow deliberate walk stopping at bridge entrance, blue-grey desaturated atmosphere, faint metallic sheen on armor, fog acting as soft diffuse background wall, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Static telephoto, subject walks toward camera out of fog and stops, fog swirls around armored figure

cuts.subject: 두 전사가 다리 양 끝에 멈춰 서로의 실루엣을 발견
cuts.action: 두 전사가 다리 양쪽 끝에서 대칭으로 정지, 안개 사이로 서로를 바라봄
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic extreme wide symmetrical shot, two warriors standing at opposite ends of ancient ruined stone bridge in thick morning fog, left side: Aiden, medieval knight in dark steel partial plate armor with chain mail, longsword with runic engravings, right side: Kagemasa, samurai in deep navy oyoroi armor with gold imperial crest, wide shoulder sode, nodachi sword with cherry blossom tsuba, two silhouettes facing each other across the bridge, perfect bilateral symmetry, blue-grey monochrome atmosphere, fog filling the abyss beneath the bridge, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Locked-off static wide, complete stillness, only fog moving slowly between the two figures

cuts.subject: 카게마사의 손이 노다치 칼집에 얹히고 에이든의 롱소드 칼날이 천천히 뽑힘
cuts.action: 카게마사가 왼손을 노다치 칼집에 올림 / 에이든이 롱소드를 천천히 뽑기 시작, 검날의 금속음이 안개 속에 울림
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic extreme close-up split insert, left frame: gauntleted hand resting on nodachi scabbard with cherry blossom tsuba detail, deep navy lacquered sheath, right frame: longsword blade slowly drawing from scabbard, faint runic engraving catching diffuse fog light, blue-grey desaturated, metallic gleam, tense stillness before combat, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Left: static hand placement on hilt. Right: slow blade draw, rack focus follows blade edge

cuts.subject: 두 전사의 발이 석조 다리 위에서 천천히 서로를 향해 한 걸음씩 내딛음
cuts.action: 에이든과 카게마사의 철갑 발걸음이 교차 편집으로, 안개 속 다리를 향해 내딛음
cuts.frame_prompt: Cinematic medium close-up low angle, stone bridge surface level, two sets of armored boots stepping forward onto moss-covered ruined stone bridge, left: dark steel sabatons of Aiden, medieval knight, right: deep navy lacquered armored waraji sandals of Kagemasa, samurai kensei, each taking one deliberate step toward each other, fog-filled bridge gap between them, blue-grey desaturated, For Honor cinematic trailer style, photorealistic, 1920x1080, 16:9 composition
cuts.motion_desc: Cross-cut between the two feet stepping forward, camera stays low near stone surface
